name: Euler's Identity
author: Leonhard Euler
description: Considered the most beautiful equation in mathematics, it connects five fundamental constants.

name: Mass-Energy Equivalence
author: Albert Einstein
description: States that mass can be converted into energy and vice versa, forming the basis of nuclear physics.

name: Law of Universal Gravitation
author: Isaac Newton
description: Describes the attractive force between two bodies with mass, explaining both falling apples and planetary orbits.
